allow: Bash(node -e "const t=require\('jsonwebtoken'\); const v=process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN; console.log\('JWT_EXPIRES_IN =', JSON.stringify\(v\)\); try { const tok=t.sign\({id:1},'x',v?{expiresIn:v}:{}\); const d=t.decode\(tok\); console.log\('decoded.exp =', d.exp, '=> expires_at =', new Date\(\(d.exp||NaN\)*1000\).toString\(\)\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('SIGN ERROR:', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "process.env.JWT_SECRET='x'; const s=require\('./services/sessionService'\); console.log\('module loads OK'\);")
